notes: Shortly after startup appears an error message: nDShowServer::PlayFile(): Could not render file 'Z:/home/<username>/.steam/steam/steamapps/common/Drakensang/export/data/movies/intro_16_9.mpg'
title: Drakensang

notes: right-click on game in Steam left column > click properties > set launch options... > paste in "-novideo" without the quotes.
title: Drakensang

notes: Just add `-novideo` to the launch options and it runs perfectly!
title: Drakensang

notes: To start the game, -novideo has to be added to the start options. With Proton 3.16-4 I had crashes sometimes (not often) when the game loads a new area — sometimes the progress bar freezes, sometimes the game crashed with an out of memory error. So I switched to Proton 3.16-6 Beta and added PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 to the startup command line. Now the game runs perfectly.
title: Drakensang
